message:
Add toolchain detection and complete CLI color styling

- Implement ToolchainInfo struct with channel detection (stable/beta/nightly)
- Add detect_toolchain() function with rust-toolchain.toml/legacy file support
- Add parse_rustc_version() for extracting version info from rustc --version
- Add wrap_command_with_toolchain() for rustup run integration
- Integrate toolchain module into SelectionRequest for worker selection
- Complete colored output implementation across all CLI commands:
  - workers_benchmark(), workers_drain(), workers_enable()
  - daemon_start(), daemon_stop(), daemon_restart(), daemon_logs()
  - config_show(), config_init()
  - hook_uninstall()
- Add StatusIndicator enum with Success/Error/Warning/Info/Pending/InProgress/Disabled
- All 203 tests passing, clippy and fmt clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
